zh.lifeSummary: 當John Neale於1450年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親Thomas Neale II21歲，母親Johanna Wilkinson17歲。他於1478年與Elizabeth Belsher在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波洛結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1535年在他的家鄉享年85歲。

nameMeanings.name: Neale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Neal
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French, Anglo-Norman French, and Middle English personal name Neel, Nele, Nihel, Niel, itself derived from the Latin name Nigellus (a diminutive of Latin niger ‘black’), originally a nickname for someone with black hair or a dark complexion. The name was very common among Normans and was brought to England at the time of the Norman Conquest. There has been considerable confusion with the Irish and Scottish Gaelic name Niall (see Neil ); the two names are now pronounced identically. It is theoretically possible that in Normandy, where the personal name was popular, that it was also used for Old Norse Njáll, but this is difficult to prove. Njáll was adopted from the Irish Gaelic personal name Niall by Vikings in Ireland, who took it back to Iceland and Norway, but whether the Vikings also took Njáll to Normandy and to the northwest of England, is an open question, which cannot be settled on the available evidence.
English: alternatively from the Middle English personal name Nele, a variant of Nell as a pet form of Elias (see Ellis ). Compare Nelson , Nielson .
Scottish and Irish: shortened form of   McNeal   (see   McNeil  ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Neale was born in 1450, in Staffordshire, England, his father, Thomas Neale II, was 21 and his mother, Johanna Wilkinson, was 17. He married Elizabeth Belsher in 1478, in Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1535, in his hometown, at the age of 85.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Belsher en 1478, à Ellesborough, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1535, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 85 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Nealeが1450年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Neale IIは21歳，母Johanna Wilkinsonは17歳であった。1478年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエレスボロウでElizabeth Belsherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1535年に故郷で85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Neale(이)가 1450년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Neale II(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Wilkinson(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 엘레스버루그h에서 Elizabeth Belsher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1535년 그의 고향에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Neale родился в 1450 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Neale II было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Johanna Wilkinson, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Belsher в 1478 г. в местности эллесбороую, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1535 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 85 лет.
